members.name: forceMount
members.description:
Used to force mounting when more control is needed.

Useful when controlling animation with Vue animation libraries.

members.name: asChild
members.description: Change the default rendered element for the one passed as a child, merging their props and behavior.

members.description: The element or component this component should render as. Can be overwrite by `asChild`

members.description:
The open state of the collapsible when it is initially rendered.

Use when you do not need to control its open state.

members.name: open
members.description: The controlled open state of the collapsible. Can be bound with `v-model`.

members.name: disabled
members.description: When `true`, prevents the user from interacting with the collapsible.

members.name: unmountOnHide
members.description: When `true`, the element will be unmounted on closed state.
